terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: Welcome to all viewers, readers, and digital users of Daily Destiny. We are committed to delivering fast, accurate, and unbiased news. The term “user” refers to anyone accessing our content through our website or social media platforms such as Facebook, YouTube, Twitter, and others. By using our services, you are deemed to have accepted these terms and conditions.
terms.disclaimerText: All content published on Daily Destiny, including news, images, and videos, is collected from various sources such as individuals, organizations, and research institutions. Responsibility for the accuracy of such information primarily lies with those sources. While we strive to verify information carefully, Daily Destiny does not assume direct liability for any inaccuracies. The authority reserves the right to accept or reject user feedback at its discretion.
terms.intelectualText: All materials on Daily Destiny—including text, images, videos, logos, graphics, and other assets—are the property of the organization. Unauthorized use, especially for commercial purposes, is strictly prohibited. Legal action may be taken in case of violations.
terms.legalText: Daily Destiny operates in accordance with applicable laws and media regulations. Users are expected to follow these standards when interacting with our platforms. Any violation of law by a user will be their sole responsibility.
terms.contentText: Daily Destiny reserves the right to modify, update, or remove any content at any time without prior notice.
terms.advertisementText: Advertisements displayed on our platforms are created by third-party advertisers. Daily Destiny does not take responsibility for the content or impact of such advertisements; liability rests with the respective advertisers.

privacy.description: Daily Destiny places the highest importance on protecting the privacy and personal information of its users. This policy explains how user information is collected, used, and managed when accessing our platform.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.personalText: We are committed to safeguarding users’ personal data, including names, phone numbers, email addresses, social media IDs, age, and address. Such information may be used in a limited capacity for improving services, analytics, and enhancing user experience.
privacy.userContentText: Any comments, opinions, or information shared by users on our website or social media platforms remain their sole responsibility. Daily Destiny does not guarantee the accuracy or authenticity of such content. Appropriate action may be taken against fake or unauthorized activities. Users are advised to exercise caution when sharing information.
privacy.advertisementText: Advertisements displayed on our platform are managed by third-party advertisers. Daily Destiny does not take responsibility for the content, accuracy, or acceptability of these advertisements. All liabilities rest with the respective advertisers.
privacy.childrenText: Our content is primarily intended for adult audiences. We do not knowingly collect or store personal information from children. However, we remain mindful of children’s psychological well-being when publishing content.
privacy.cookiesText: Daily Destiny does not store users’ cookies or personal browsing data. If any third party collects such information, it is beyond our responsibility.
privacy.copyrightText: All content published by Daily Destiny is protected under applicable copyright and intellectual property laws. Unauthorized or commercial use of our content is strictly prohibited. Limited use for non-commercial informational purposes may be allowed with proper attribution. Legal action may be taken in case of violations.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Daily Destiny is a leading media organization dedicated to delivering accurate, unbiased, and timely news to our viewers. We strive to maintain the highest standards of journalism while serving the public interest.
about.missionText: To provide fast, accurate, and unbiased news coverage that informs, educates, and empowers our audience. We are committed to journalistic integrity and ethical reporting practices.
about.visionText: To become the most trusted and respected media organization in the region, known for our commitment to truth, transparency, and public service.
about.teamText: Our dedicated team of journalists, editors, and media professionals work tirelessly to bring you the most relevant and important news stories. With years of experience in the field, we ensure quality reporting.
about.valuesText: Integrity, accuracy, impartiality, and public service are the core values that guide our operations. We believe in responsible journalism that serves the greater good of society.
about.contactText: We welcome your feedback, suggestions, and news tips. You can reach us through our website, social media platforms, or by contacting our editorial team directly. Your voice matters to us.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with Daily Destiny for news, inquiries, or feedback. We value your communication and strive to respond promptly.
contact.address: Daily Destiny, SK Center, G. P- Ja-4, Mohakhali TB gate, Gulshan, Dhaka-1212
